title: De Thijs Pack
description:
This is the ThijsBuitink Modpack
This pack has shaders and you can use it for content creation
body:
![The Thijs Pack Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ed821de4e5e3fde7464886d31d4e2e4c9bb325b4_0.webp)

This is the ThijsBuitink Modpack
This pack has shaders and you can use it for content creation
The flashback mod is great for replay 
and with the new 1.21.10 update you can crazy copper tools/armor and you have with the copper golems a automatic chest
